perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with her hair tied back, wearing a white mesh top, stands in a kitchen and speaks directly to the camera, holding up images of a man and another woman. (2) She presents a tube of wasabi and then reveals her secret ingredients: Vegemite and red chilies. (3) Wearing black gloves, she carefully places the chilies and smears Vegemite onto salmon sushi on a white board. (4) A man in a blue varsity jacket and another woman join her; they gather around the sushi board. (5) The man picks a piece of sushi, eats it, and immediately reacts with shock and discomfort, spitting it out while the others laugh. (6) The group holds up a graphic promoting a 'HAHA BABY' road run event. (7) Another man is filmed eating a dark-colored sushi piece, appearing surprisingly unfazed.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks in an energetic, high-pitched tone with upbeat, bouncy background music. (2) Sound of a jar opening and soft kitchen noises as she prepares food. (3) The music stays consistent as more voices enter; a male voice greets the audience loudly. (4) Loud shouting, gagging sounds, and chaotic laughter follow the prank reveal. (5) A rhythmic chant or group shout occurs during the event promotion phase. (6) Casual conversation and laughter continue until the end with a slight fade out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles throughout the video translating the spoken Chinese dialogue. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: 'Vegemite + raw chili' with explosion graphics. (3) Decorative/Hook Text: 'Prank successful?' appearing during the reaction. (4) Functional Text: '8/8 HAHA BABY Road Run registration starts now!!!!' in large, colorful font.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Prank Preparation -> Prank Execution/Reaction -> Event Promotion -> Bonus Prank

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female host, 1 male target (Cai Aga), 1 secondary female (Er Bo), 1 male staff member, 1 female assistant in background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main female host has fair skin, dark hair with a clip, wearing a white mesh long-sleeve shirt. The main male character wears a blue and white varsity jacket with 'HAHA' and 'BABY' printed on it.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern indoor kitchen with white cabinets, a refrigerator, a stovetop, and various cooking utensils. Later, a more studio-like hallway area with lighting equipment is visible.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Preparation -> Climax -> Promotion -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to entertain viewers with a classic 'gross food' prank on a well-known personality (Cai Aga) while strategically using the high engagement of the prank to promote the 'HAHA BABY' road run event. It utilizes fast-paced editing and variety-show style graphics to maintain energy.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The characters wear the brand's clothing and spend a significant portion of the video specifically announcing the dates and registration details for the road run.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-pitched enthusiastic delivery, fast-paced variety show captions, and the involvement of the 'Cai Aga' family ensemble.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively blends personal vlog-style content (the prank) with commercial intent (the event promotion), which is a common strategy for Taiwanese influencers to maintain viewer retention during ad-segments.
